subject: F1000 Monthly Update - February 2015
body:
To ensure you receive F1000 emails, add info@updates.f1000.com to your safelist.

-----------------------------------------------------

Faculty of 1000 |  http://f1000.com                
Monthly Update  |  January 2015

----------------------------------------------------- 

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~    
Announcing the CiteAb Antibody Award Winners!
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~    

Congratulations to all of the 2014 CiteAb Antibody Award winners, announced this week.

F1000Research partnered with CiteAb [ http://www.citeab.com/ ] to deliver the very first CiteAb Antibody Awards. The CiteAb Antibody Awards celebrate the very best suppliers and individuals in the research antibody sector worldwide.

See the full award outcomes, including runners up, here [ http://citeab.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8d621bd2da1b3aa7dbd3067b&id=2124162b17&e=13dc01d8dd ].


   F1000Prime                                
==================
  
Below is a selection of recommendations added by our Faculty of 10,000+ Members over the past month:


8 *

No need to say no to NO 
[ http://f1000.com/prime/718540124?key=aGbIHbeDJMlNRVt ]
An important clinical trial in anesthesiology definitively answers one of the most controversial topics: the safety of nitrous oxide (NO). NO does not contribute to perioperative risk.
Myles PS, Leslie K, Chan MT et al.
Lancet. 2014; 384:1446-54


8 *

Learning to grow a spine 
[ http://f1000.com/prime/718889845?key=oV3Yp2kzNjcTig5 ]
A critical window of 0.3-2 seconds exists for dopamine release after a glutamate signal, causing dendritic spines of a striatal neuron to grow. This may be a cellular correlate of reward learning.
Yagishita S, Hayashi-Takagi A, Ellis-Davies GC et al.
Science. 2014; 345:1616-20


11 *
"A must-read for auxinists" 
[ http://f1000.com/prime/718262210?key=rgfnl1dPt8cOZhy ]
These findings represent a major step forward in understanding how the plant hormone auxin regulates transcription for development.
Boer DR, Freire-Rios A, van den Berg WA et al.
Cell. 2014; 156:577-89


F1000Prime Reports
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ 

Open-access review journal [ http://f1000.com/prime/reports/ ], reporting on the hottest topics.

Solving the puzzle of autoimmunity - critical questions 
[ http://f1000.com/prime/reports/b/7/17 ]
It is becoming clear that genetic predisposition to autoimmune diseases resides in a large number of genes encoding key immunological components whose expression is under epigenetic control, which can be influenced by environmental factors in susceptible individuals.
F1000Prime Report by Smilek DE and St. Clair EW [ http://f1000.com/prime/thefaculty/member/276907396370183 ].
F1000Prime Rep 2015, 7:17

 ---------------
 See all recent F1000Prime Reports          
 >> http://f1000.com/prime/reports/                 
 --------------- 


---------------------- 

~~~~~~~~~
F1000 community meet-up 
~~~~~~~~~

The next F1000 meet-up will be on February 10 in Oxford [ http://blog.f1000.com/2015/01/29/f1000-oxford-meet-up-on-february-10/ ]. Please register [ https://www.eventbrite.co.uk/e/f1000-oxford-community-meet-up-tickets-15516501273 ] (free) and join us for complimentary food, drinks and chat! See our blog for more details [ http://blog.f1000.com/2015/01/29/f1000-oxford-meet-up-on-february-10/ ].
 

~~~~~~~~~
F1000Prime mobile app 
~~~~~~~~~
 
Use F1000Prime on the go with our user-friendly mobile app [ http://f1000.com/prime/mobile ]. Keep up to date with the best papers while on the move. Find out more [ http://f1000.com/prime/mobile ].


---------------------- 

    
   F1000Research                      
======================

Our innovative open science publishing platform [ http://f1000research.com/ ] offering rapid publication, open peer review and open data.

Below is a selection of our latest peer reviewed articles:

OPINION ARTICLE
Shaping the Future of Research: a perspective from junior scientists [ http://f1000research.com/articles/3-291/v2 ] [v2; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/4yc ]
Published: 09 Jan 2015
McDowell GS, Gunsalus KTW, MacKellar DC et al.
F1000Research 2015, 3:291

OPINION ARTICLE
Why are neurotransmitters neurotoxic? An evolutionary perspective [ http://f1000research.com/articles/3-179/v2 ] [v2; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/4sz ]
Published: 02 Dec 2014
Harris KD, Weiss M and Zahavi A.
F1000Research 2014, 3:179

DATA NOTE
Journal subscription expenditure of UK higher education institutions [ http://f1000research.com/articles/3-274/v2 ] [v2; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/4v0 ]
Published: 28 Nov 2014
Lawson S and Meghreblian B.
F1000Research 2014, 3:274

RESEARCH NOTE
Binding of a fluorescence reporter and a ligand to an odorant-binding protein of the yellow fever mosquito, Aedes aegypti [ http://f1000research.com/articles/3-305 ] [v2; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/4yp ] 
Published: 09 Jan 2015
Leal GM and Leal WS.
F1000Research 2015, 3:305

 ---------------------------------------------
  Submit now to F1000Research          
  >> http://f1000research.com/author/submit        
 ---------------------------------------------- 

~~~~~~~~~ 
Peer review education
~~~~~~~~~ 

Have you seen our page with tips for writing a good peer review report [ http://f1000research.com/for-referees/peer-reviewing-tips ]? We are currently collaborating with the NYU Neuroscience Institute on a peer review workshop. Contact us [ mailto:research@f1000.com ] if you would also like to work with us to educate young researchers about peer review.
 

"Don?t be afraid to be positive. If a paper that you are asked to review is really good, say so!"
? Anthony Imbalzano, University of Massachusetts Medical School

     F1000Posters                 
======================

Open Repository [ http://f1000.com/posters ] for posters and slide presentations; completely free to view and submit. Below is a selection:


STRUCTURAL BIOLOGY   
Cis-trans flips: peptide bond conformation correction [ http://f1000.com/posters/browse/summary/1097502 ]
Touw W and Vriend G.
F1000Posters 2015,
6:84  

NEUROLOGICAL DISORDERS 
Screening for C9ORF72 repeat expansion in amyotrophic lateral sclerosis [ http://f1000.com/posters/browse/summary/1097464 ]
Mosca L, Tarlarini C, Lunetta C et al.
F1000Posters 2015,
6:62

IMMUNOLOGY
Evaluating the potential of novel virus-vectored vaccines as intranasal vaccine candidates for broad immunity against influenza [ http://f1000.com/posters/browse/summary/1097450 ]
Mullin J, Ahmed MS, Upile N et al.
F1000Posters 2015,
6:39

  ----------------------------------------------
  Deposit now        
  >> http://f1000.com/posters/fordepositors      
  ----------------------------------------------


 
----------------------

@F1000 [ http://twitter.com/f1000 ]  
@F1000Research [ http://twitter.com/f1000research ]     
@F1000Posters [ http://twitter.com/f1000posters ]  
 
  * 'Like' us on Facebook * 
  
F1000Prime [ https://www.facebook.com/F1000 ]   
F1000Research [ https://www.facebook.com/F1000Research ]

  * Connect with us on LinkedIn *  
  
Faculty of 1000 [ https://www.linkedin.com/groups?mostRecent=&gid=1971657 ]   
F1000Research [ https://www.linkedin.com/groups?home=&gid=4267793 ]  
F1000 Specialists [ https://www.linkedin.com/groups?mostRecent=&gid=8123808 ]  
  
 * Follow our blogs * 
  
F1000Prime Blog [ http://blog.f1000.com/ ]
F1000Research Blog [ http://blog.f1000research.com/ ]
 
 
----------------------


-----------------------------------------------------

If you do not wish to receive any further such messages, you may unsubscribe [ http://www.f1000.com/unsubscribe/email?email=jeeproject@yahoo.com&emailAlertType=MONTHLY_UPDATES ] at any time.
